summary_raw: NVDA hit intraday high $203, low $197.12 on May 3. Stock fell 4 consecutive days. Jensen Huang announced Ising quantum AI model. NVDA pledging up to $500B in US manufacturing. Pentagon AI contracts won alongside Amazon. Buy consensus from 37 analysts, $272 avg target.
